{{Infobox group
| name = Dreadgod cult
| introduced = cradle-04-skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|There is a cult of a [[Dreadgod]] that operates beyond the [[Empire]]'s southeastern border.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c10">''Skysworn'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Tiberian]]'s technique would destroy the [[Dreadgod cult]] if [[Yerin]] used [[Moonlight Bridge]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19">''Dreadgod'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Twin Star Sect]] is being called a [[Dreadgod cult]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6">''Waybound'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Everyone in a [[Dreadgod cult]] came from humble beginnings.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|It's the cult of a Dreadgod,” she said, so softly that he wouldn't have been able to pick up her words without his Iron body. “Usually, they operate beyond the Empire's southeastern border.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c10" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
